name: Sujan
overview: Sujan is a Gilani girl with kindness and steely will. In the heart of the green forests of the north and in the midst of historical events, he experiences romantic adventures that will change him forever. From the saga of the Jungle Movement to the Pahlavi era, Sujan fights with all his heart for his family and land.

trailers.title: سریال عاشقانه و جدید سوجان 1 - قسمت 34 | Serial Soojan 1 - Part 34
